generated_oml:
instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR sensor for raw point cloud data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudData
]

instance IntelD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel D435i depth camera for raw depth image data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthImageData
]

instance VehicleSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vehicle speed sensor providing ego-vehicle speed state"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleSpeedData
]

instance SteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering-angle sensor providing ego-vehicle steering angle state"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringAngleData
]

instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
]

instance DepthImageData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelD435iDepthCamera
]

instance VehicleSpeedData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleSpeedSensor
]

instance SteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringAngleSensor
]

instance LiDARPointCloudProcessed : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Preprocessed LiDAR point cloud data after serialization and unit conversion"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DBSCANClusteringEnabler
]

instance DepthImageProcessed : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Preprocessed depth image data after serialization and unit conversion"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DepthImageData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo KalmanFilterTrackingEnabler
]

instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed vehicle speed and steering angle state data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedData, SteeringAngleData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCEnabler
]

instance DBSCANClusteringOutput : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Clustering output from DBSCAN algorithm on LiDAR data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo KalmanFilterTrackingEnabler
]

instance KalmanFilterOutput : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Object tracking data from Kalman filter"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ObjectTrackingData
]

instance ObjectTrackingData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed object tracking data for visualization and ACC"
]

instance VehicleStateDatabase : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "SQL database storing time-series vehicle state and object tracks"
]

instance VedderElectronicSpeedController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Vedder electronic speed controller for motor voltage actuation to control vehicle speed"
]

instance SteeringServo : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering servo for steering angle actuation"
]

instance DataTranslationFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Data Translation Functional Entity for serialization and unit conversion"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance DBSCANClusteringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "DBSCAN algorithm for point-cloud clustering"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance KalmanFilterTrackingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Kalman filter algorithm for object tracking"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance ACCEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ACC algorithm implementation using ISO 15622 model"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS 2 middleware for inter-process communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance Python38 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 implementation for data processing and services"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for point-cloud clustering and object tracking algorithms"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance NVIDIAJetPack50 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA JetPack 5.0 SDK for Jetson device software stack"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance ACCControlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Adaptive Cruise Control model conforming to ISO 15622 performance-class I"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCEnabler
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Data Monitoring service for real-time UI visualization of vehicle speed, steering angle, object tracks, and projected path with reporting and data export"
    DTDFVocab:provides VehicleSpeedInsight, SteeringAngleInsight, ObjectTracksInsight, PlannedPathInsight
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Computation Offloading service for ACC algorithm, lead-vehicle detection, and speed set-point computation"
    DTDFVocab:provides LeadVehicleDetection, SpeedSetPointComputation
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote Management service for UI controls to enable/disable ACC, modify desired speed, and trigger emergency braking"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableACCAction, DisableACCAction, AdjustDesiredSpeedAction, EmergencyBrakingAction
]

instance VehicleSpeedInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time vehicle speed visualization"
]

instance SteeringAngleInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time steering angle visualization"
]

instance ObjectTracksInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time object tracks visualization"
]

instance PlannedPathInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Planned path visualization"
]

instance LeadVehicleDetection : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of lead vehicle for ACC"
]

instance SpeedSetPointComputation : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Computed speed set-point for ACC"
]

instance EnableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enable Adaptive Cruise Control"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DisableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Disable Adaptive Cruise Control"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance AdjustDesiredSpeedAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjust desired speed for ACC"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Trigger emergency braking"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance UserInterface : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "User Interface for real-time visualization and control"
]

instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR, IntelD435iDepthCamera, VehicleSpeedSensor, SteeringAngleSensor, VedderElectronicSpeedController, SteeringServo
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains DBSCANClusteringEnabler, KalmanFilterTrackingEnabler, ACCControlModel, ACCEnabler, VehicleStateDatabase, ROS2Middleware, Python38, MATLABSimulink, NVIDIAJetPack50
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains UserInterface
]

instance CrossSystemEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains DataTranslationFE
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin issues control commands over ROS2/Wi‑Fi to the physical twin, including desired speed values, enable/disable ACC signals, emergency‑brake commands, and any steering adjustments; these are executed by the Actuation FE on the physical twin."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The DT operates with a maximum end‑to‑end network latency of 100 ms (R7) and clock synchronization accuracy of 100 ms (R8), supporting near‑real‑time update rates sufficient for ACC control loops."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A distributed architecture where the Physical Twin Entity hosts sensors and actuators, the Digital Twin Entity hosts data collection, ACC computation, visualization preprocessing, and reporting, the User Entity provides a 3D visualization and control‑panel UI, and a Cross‑System Entity handles data translation; communication uses ROS 2 intra‑entity and Wi‑Fi inter‑entity links."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT is employed during the operation stage of the vehicle lifecycle, providing runtime monitoring, control, and remote management of the ACC function."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Latency ≤ 100 ms and clock sync ≤ 100 ms guarantee temporal fidelity; ACC behavior adheres to ISO 15622 (performance class I); perception fidelity is ensured by DBSCAN clustering and Kalman‑filter tracking of LiDAR point clouds; data are stored in a SQL database for auditability."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Bi‑directional communication over a Wi‑Fi network using ROS 2 messages; the Data Translation FE serializes data, aligns message types, and performs unit conversions; all links are designed to meet the 100 ms latency requirement."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity runs on the onboard NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano; the Digital Twin Entity is hosted on external compute (cloud/edge) accessible via Wi‑Fi; UI components of the User Entity run on a separate workstation accessed by operators."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The system is built on the ISO 23247 reference architecture, complies with ISO 15622 for ACC functionality, and utilizes ROS 2 as a standardized middleware; optional OPC UA is mentioned as a possible transport layer."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "The design acknowledges the safety‑critical nature of ACC, enforces a maximum 100 ms latency and synchronized clocks to ensure reliable control; however, specific cybersecurity mechanisms are not described in the document."
]
